name: Sweet Potato Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Sweet potatoes, cut into pieces and boiled
2 T Virgin or extra-virgin olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the sweet potatoes and mash with a fork, ricer, or electric mixer.
2. Add oil, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and milk. Beat until light and fluffy.
3. Stir in chopped pecans and shape into 8 flat round patties.
4. Dip both sides of each patty into ground pecans to coat.
5. Place the patties on a lightly oiled baking sheet and dot with butter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F for 20 minutes.
7. Serve with mushroom gravy.
